choices: You have no idea what you turned into.
1.content:
You start working on your project in studying what certain animal traits are. "Damn, this job is boring" you mumble to yourself. You really couldn't find any other job out there; this was the only job available at the time.

You sigh for a bit while actually not paying attention to what your doing. You hear loud bubbling and hissing "um, whoops" you say as you see the flask start to bubble and glow. "uh oh" *BOOOOOM!* you wake up from the freak explosion 5 minutes later.

"I really got to be more careful next time" You say gracefully to yourself. You rub your head and shake yourself out of the daze you went through and slowly walk back to the table you were just at but not before passing by a big mirror first. You look into it first and freak out.
1.title: Let the transformation begin!

11.content: You begin to panic as you see yourself almost naked and covered with scales, but what kind of reptile did you become?
11.title: You turned into something scaly!

choices: Yes, but you also have standard dragon forearms.
1111.title: One other question...

choices: You head towards a fast food joint.
You head towards the nearest restaurant.
You head towards the nearest cheese factory.
You head towards the nearest ice cream parlor.
12.content:
As you transformed into something impossibly huge and hairy in this case Disney's own Mickey mouse.

"Oh no i'm a vicious impossibly huge monster version of Mickey Mouse." you say looking at the big mirror in front of you. Then a vicious evil thought came to mind as you grinned evilly.

"Now that i'm a vicious impossibly huge monster version of Mickey Mouse, i feel like devouring as much food as possible and to that i say it's dinner time!" You bellow out loud as you proceed to heavily stomp towards one of the laboratory's walls, leaving a hole in it as you proceed to stomp towards the city itself.
12.title: You turned into something hairy!

choices: Try to talk to the police.
124.content:
As you stomp to the nearest ice cream parlor, everyone around you screams, terrified. Oh no! You seem to have forgotten that you are a monster version of Mickey Mouse. Soom, you hear the wailing sirens in the distance.

Great!

You think sarcastically, letting out a frustrated moan. What should you do next?
124.title: You head towards the nearest ice cream parlor.

choices: You visit other scientists who had the same accident as you.
You just continue on with your work.
You go out and meet some other anthro animal people.
14133.content: You gaze surprised at your new body. Your now a giant, nude, covered in feathers and fur peacock man; you flap open your big tail fan and almost knock something over and gaze at your hand wings and feel your new beak "Well, this isn't TOO bad" you say to yourself before closing your big tail fan. You start walking around, your talon feet clicking on the ground and your tail lightly dragging behind you. You lift one of your feet up and look at it "Geez that looks scary" you say with an uneasy voice before putting it down. "what to do next though" you think while rubbing the bottom of your beak with one of your wing hands.

Another anthro animal is watching you.
141331.content:
You look at your wing hands and think to yourself "Hmm, Maybe i can attempt to fly, just not here" so you go to a big open unit nearby the labs that JUST so happens to test the flight patterns in animals. It's not being used at the moment but you're just going to test and see if you can achieve flight or not. You go up one of the small ramps for now. You don't dare try the big ones quite yet.

You stand on the platform, jump off, open your wings and start flapping...
141331.title: You try to fly.

Then as soon as you get over the small rodent dude you lift your legs out in front of you, position your rear below you then butt first drop down onto the small rodent dude with a hard "WHAM!* and a *SQUISH!* sound. You stay there for a while before lifting your butt and tail fan up a little to see your flattened creation from your hard butt-stomp. You then decide to start bouncing your butt continuously on the small rodent dude while your closed tail fan is flapping up and down "Well, that was great" you say with a smirk. You get up while making a peeling sound and continue on with your day but not before jumping backwards and butt-stomping back down onto the rodent dude first. You then get back up and continue on with your day.
1413351.title: You fly above him and butt stomp him flat.

154.content: You were transformed into a mutant super person. You noticed that you were noticeably taller. You inspect the mirror closely to see if there were any subtle changes that you missed. You then look into the mirror in shock as you start...
154.title: A mutant super person

choices: Dr. Klemine decides to use you as a lab rat or lab bear in your case
Dr. Klemine decides to use you as a superhero
1541.content:
You then look into the mirror in shock as you start growing fur, big muscles, a musclegut and claws that come from your fingers. As the back fur grows on your body your face takes on a more bearlike appearance. When the transformation stops you resemble an anthropomorphized bear, but it is clear that your still human. You try taking in the shock of the sudden transformation. You feel stronger and faster than 500,000 bears and judging by your glowing eyes you could probably shoot lasers out of your eyes. You then test that theory by concentrating on the mirror.

To your surprise a laser bean comes out of your eyes and bounces across the entire room. You look on in shock as the beam bounces around the room and stops after one minute. Just as you were wondering about the ruin lab equipment you find yourself floating in midair. You begin panicking as you discover your powers of flight. Clearly besides the obvious physical transformation you obviously has some superpowers and super strength wouldn't be a bad guess judging that your muscles grew larger and for some strange reason you developed a huge muscle gut.

"This is just creepy." You said in a noticeably deeper voice. "What will my coworkers think when they see the monster I have become? I'm some kind of mutant freak of nature who looks like a bear."

You begin sobbing, unaware that it caused the glass to shatter. Normally you wouldn't cry, but the added testosterone is causing you to have an emotional breakdown. You then hear voices from down the hall.

"What is that noise Dr. Klemine?"

"I don't know but we must find out." Dr. Klemine replied as she fixed her glasses.

Upon discovering you...
1541.title: The Incredible Grizzlyman

1551.content:
Amid the smoke and rubble you looked down at yourself as you now had fur and a tail on your butt as you looked at your reflection as you've transformed into a furry dog like superhero of some sort as you're wearing a spandex suit that came with a belt gloves and mask as there was a symbol on your spandex suit as you're also incredibly obese and huge as well.

"What have I transformed into?" You asked yourself.

Ice Hound: a Dalmatian like superhero whose superpowers include being able to freeze people in mere seconds along with creating ice based weapons with ease as you also have a healing factor too as your spandex body suit's color is bright blue with a cyan colored belt and gloves as your suit's symbol is an ice cube.

Earth Hound: Earth Hound a husky dog like superhero whose superpowers include the ability to levitate rocks with your paws and launch them at your enemies as you're also super fast and have a healing factor as well as your spandex suit is brown along with a green belt gloves and mask as your spandex suit's symbol is cracked ground.

Sky Hound: another Dalmatian like superhero whose superpowers include manipulating air flying and a healing factor as your spandex's suit is red with an orange belt gloves and a green mask as your spandex suit's symbol happens to be clouds.

Bounce Hound: a Dalmatian like superhero whose superpowers consist of bouncing to great heights changing both your weight and height at will inflation and a healing factor too as your spandex suit's color is dark blue with a yellow belt gloves and mask as your spandex suit's symbol is a bouncy ball.

15533.title: Something extra

info.brief_description: You transform into a monster or just an anthro from a lab experiment gone wrong.
info.description:
You were doing a test on defferent types of creatures when a freak accident made you transform into a vicious monster or just an anthro creature.

Hairy, Scaly, Slimy, anything goes except sex and extreme gore (ex: Guts splattering everywhere, heads blowing up) vore IS one of the things i will allow. Terror and screaming maybe. Have fun.

If you seen The Were Experiment(http://www.writing.com/main/interact/item_id/1836768-The-Were-Experiment) it's like that one except you do the transformation to yourself.
